note: Default payment timing rules for goods contracts absent contrary agreement.

citation: Prompt Payment Act, 31 U.S.C. § 3901 et seq.
note: Prompt payment requirements applicable to certain federal government contracts and subcontracts.
Recognizes a seller's right to the contract price, informing common contractual interest-on-arrears provisions absent a governing statutory rate.
Good-faith withholding of a disputed portion of performance (here, payment) while tendering the undisputed balance is consistent with substantial-performance principles.
